violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet rooms doors must be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took ice machine out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. PIC discarded ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

Sandwiches with deli meat were observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC were placed in walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

The ice machine was observed with an air break where an air gap is required. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025
Wall ceiling in the dry storage areas is unfinished, with exposed spun insulation. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2023
